## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to break)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes (terraform fmt + validate)
- [ ] Kubernetes manifests include resource requests/limits
- [ ] New scripts are executable and use `set -euo pipefail`
- [ ] Helm values reference upstream chart documentation
- [ ] ArgoCD Application manifest added (if new component)
- [ ] Makefile target added (if new component)
- [ ] README updated (if structure or usage changed)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
